subject: [PATCH 3/4] nfsd: check delegation status in nfsd4_cb_notify_done

2026-05-23.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the nfsd kernel module where an NFSv4 callback function would spin indefinitely if a delegation had been closed or revoked, preventing the delegation from being freed. The fix involves adding a check at the top of the nfsd4_cb_notify_done function to terminate the callback promptly when the delegation is no longer valid. This ensures that the sc_count reference is released and the delegation can be freed as expected.
